headline: Intuitive Surgical Has Dropped 20% This Year. Wall Street Says It's Time to Buy.
summary: Intuitive Surgical is in its own bear market, which has historically been a good time for aggressive growth investors to buy.

headline: Can ISRG's da Vinci 5 Momentum Sustain Procedure and Utilization Gains?
summary: ISRG's da Vinci 5 is driving stronger utilization and procedure growth, but can higher throughput and after-hours surgeries sustain momentum?

headline: Jim Cramer Discusses the Performance of Danaher and Its Peers
summary: Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) was one of the stocks on which Jim Cramer shared his take, explaining that dot-com analogies do not hold up in this market.
